content.en:
What appeared in front of Ye Tian was a gray brand, due to the loss of its owner, its original eternal treasure aura diffused out, causing a certain amount of suppression to Ye Tiandu

Its aura is incomparably majestic, imbued with mysterious and majestic power, which escapes and forms a special realm.

"It's really an eternal treasure, but it should be a very ordinary eternal treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He obtained a fragment of the Eternal Arcana, and the cyan bell that he saw from the image of his breath was much more powerful than the Eternal Arcana in front of him.

Eternal treasures have power that people can't reach, and the same is true of this gray brand, there is an endless time and space around it, Ye Tian can sense it, but it is difficult to touch.

But he knew very well that there was definitely a way to reach the Eternal Treasure, otherwise, how would Lord Muchen obtain this Eternal Treasure and refine it?

But he tried many times, but he still fell far short of reaching this eternal treasure.

So, one of his replica bodies came to the prison of the raincoat lord and consulted the 08 raincoat lord.

The raincoat lord didn't want to die, so she didn't dare not answer Ye Tian's request.

"Lord of the Raincoat, there should be a lot of Eternal Treasures in the Infinite Sea, if you find the Eternal Treasure, how can you take the Eternal Treasure? I found that the Eternal Treasure seems to be in the depths of endless time and space, and it cannot be touched at all, it seems that it does not exist between heaven and earth, but in fact it exists. Ye Tian asked.

The raincoat lord replied: "The Infinite Sea does have the Eternal Treasure, but the number is not very large, basically only the Legendary Realm Lord or a few top Legendary Realm Lords have the Eternal Treasure, and it is indeed not easy to take away the Eternal Treasure of the Ownerless, even if we Immortal Realm Lords really encounter the Eternal Treasure and want to take it, it is extremely difficult, and even some weaker Legendary Realm Lords cannot take the Eternal Treasure." But if you talk about a way, there really is. "

"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

"In fact, any piece of Eternal Treasure represents the ultimate existence of one or more Eternal Daos, such as the Jingxu you mentioned earlier, Jingxu has an Eternal Treasure Blue Void Bell, and the Eternal Path represented by the Blue Void Bell is the two Eternal Paths of Heavens and Voids. The Dao of space, time, gold, wood, water, fire, and earth is actually the foundation, and the true Eternal Dao is not a single foundation, just like the Eternal Dao of Emptiness, which is dominated by the Dao of space, and has a variety of innate eternal rules such as speed, light, and darkness. It is said that if you can comprehend the eternal treasure, if you can enter one of the eternal paths, you will have the hope of getting that eternal treasure. Of course, the premise is that there is no owner of the eternal treasure, if there is a master, even if he has comprehended the endless eternal years, there is no way to get that eternal treasure. The raincoat lord explained.

"I see. "

Tian Tian nodded, and then left the prison.

......

In Lord Muchen's prison, Ye Tian's replica body never left, and now that he knew the way, he began to comprehend the eternal path contained in this gray brand.

Compared to the sword in the ruins where the True Legend Tower was located, the feeling that this brand brought to Ye Tian was clearer.

At this moment, Ye Tianxin concluded that the sword should not be on the side of the True Legend Tower, it was estimated that it was still in the Infinite Sea, and the sword of that ruin was only a space-time projection of the Eternal Treasure, and what everyone was enlightening was only a projection of the Eternal Treasure

Meditation projection may have some effect, but it will never be able to comprehend its true eternal path, at most use its projection breath to cultivate one or two, assist Enlightenment to create eternal skills or lack some secret techniques.

And at the moment.

Ye Tian felt a strong aura of Eternal Dao from this Eternal Treasure, and deeply felt a kind of Eternal Dao contained in it.

After a long time, he realized what this eternal path meant.

Mixed Yuan Road!

This is the Mixed Yuan Dao within the Eternal Dao, which can allow various forces to blend and form the Eternal Mixed Yuan Realm.

Comparatively speaking, the Mixed Yuan Dao was a bit suitable for Ye Tian, so he had a great hope of comprehending it within a certain period of time.

And the foundation of the Mixed Yuan Dao is all kinds of innate eternal rules, Ye Tian uses various innate eternal rules to comprehend the Mixed Yuan Dao, coupled with the help of this eternal treasure, Ye Tian is getting deeper and deeper in the perception of the Mixed Yuan Dao.

One eternity after another years have passed, Ye Tian's cultivation is still in the six-step immortal realm lord, but his strength has been improving, such as the will world, he has been opening up.

Today, his will world has reached more than 80,000.

Moreover, he also entered the Void Legend Tower again, broke into the nineteenth layer at one time, and then cultivated in the Void Legend for a period of time, and slightly increased the degree of fusion of his will and body, and he was very close to the seven-step Immortal Realm Lord, but this step was not so easy to cross.

About 10,000 eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally introduced the cultivation of the Eternal Mixed Yuan Dao, and he was surprised to find that the Eternal Mixed Yuan Dao actually helped to fuse the will and body, but the premise was that various precious resources were needed.

"Lord Mu Chen's Eternal Mixed Yuan Dao is also definitely entry, if he is not caught by Moshan, he can definitely grow up to 073, and it will not be difficult to become a Legendary Realm Lord at all. Ye Tian thought to himself.

With the entry-level Eternal Mixed Yuan Dao, coupled with this Eternal Treasure, his cultivation speed in the future will be much faster, and it will definitely not be long before he can be promoted to the seven-step Immortal Realm Lord realm.

"Let's see if we can take this Eternal Treasure!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand to grasp this Eternal Supreme Treasure, and the power of the Eternal Mixed Yuan Dao formed a faint realm, blessed on his hand, penetrating deep into the endless time and space, passing through layers of time and space, as if it had crossed an endless distance, and as if it had only crossed a few meters.

Finally, Ye Tian's hand touched this eternal treasure.

Wow!

The Eternal Treasure was grabbed by Ye Tian in his hand.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to refine this Eternal Treasure, so that he could use this Eternal Treasure normally.

Time passed slowly, and after about a few tribulations, Ye Tiancai refined this Eternal Treasure.

At this time, he also knew the name of this eternal treasure - the Mixed Yuan Order!

"With the Mixed Yuan Order, my strength has increased by more than ten times!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Moreover, it won't be long before he can be promoted to the Seven-Step Immortal Realm Lord.

Soon, another happy event came. _
